case_title: OLIVIA DA SILVA VS. AARON TURBO CUMMINGS ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-26-2023 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST FREDRIC LEWIS WEBSTER, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-26-2023, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-11-2023. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100190861) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DA SILVA, OLIVIA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-26-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-16-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-28-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
